title: public-apis_public-apis
summary: This repo understands that developers need a single, searchable catalog of free APIs organized by domain.  The structured format (API|Description|Auth|HTTPS|CORS) is machine-parseable by design.
creator_view: This repo understands that developers need a single, searchable catalog of free APIs organized by domain. The structured format (API|Description|Auth|HTTPS|CORS) is machine-parseable by design. The Python validation scripts enforce format consistency at PR time — a quality gate that codecrafters lacks.

candidates.name: Link Validation Workflow
candidates.description: validate_links.yml (29 lines) + links.py (273 lines). Daily cron link checker. Port to sonash for docs link integrity.

candidates.name: Structured Catalog Format (enum columns)
candidates.description: API/Desc/Auth/HTTPS/CORS with constrained enum values. Reference for JASON-OS skill/tool catalog.

candidates.name: Format Validation Script Pattern
candidates.description: format.py (277 lines) + tests (466 lines). Regex-based format enforcement. Simpler version of patterns:check.

candidates.name: Google Calendar API
candidates.description: OAuth via Firebase Auth. Direct SoNash integration: sobriety milestones, meeting reminders, daily check-ins.

candidates.name: Open-Meteo Weather API
candidates.description: No auth, CORS yes. Zero-friction weather data for mood-weather correlation journaling.

candidates.name: Google Cloud Natural Language API
candidates.description: Same Firebase/Google Cloud ecosystem. Journal sentiment analysis for emotional pattern tracking.

candidates.name: validate_links.yml Workflow
candidates.description: 29-line daily cron. Directly transferable for SKILL_INDEX.md, EXTRACTIONS.md, MEMORY.md link checking.

candidates.name: Celebrity Stagnation with Infrastructure
candidates.description: Second data point with codecrafters. Proves automation alone doesn't prevent stagnation. MERGED cross-repo finding.

candidates.name: Validation Without Maintenance Trap
candidates.description: Format validation ensures structural integrity but not content freshness. Applies to patterns:check.

candidates.name: Sponsor-First README Anti-Pattern
candidates.description: 10 promoted APIs before community content. Erodes trust. Keep sponsors separate from content if JASON-OS has partners.

security.note: MIT license. Python validation scripts with no obvious injection vectors.

reliability.note: 3 CI workflows + tests. But 1 commit in 90 days — maintenance declining.

maintainability.note: 1,490 entries in single README. Format validation scripts help. Link rot inevitable at scale.

documentation.note: CONTRIBUTING.md with structured format. 40+ categories. Well-tagged.

process.note: 1,197 open issues. PRs bottlenecked. Commercial overlay (APILayer). No releases.

velocity.note: 1 commit in 90 days. 10 years old. Celebrity stagnation.

absencePattern.description: 420K stars, 1,197 open issues, 1 commit/90 days. Commercial capture by APILayer. PR approval bottleneck. Same pattern as codecrafters but with more infrastructure (validation scripts, CI).

creatorLens: This repo understands that developers need a single, searchable catalog of free APIs organized by domain. The structured format (API|Description|Auth|HTTPS|CORS) is machine-parseable by design. The Python validation scripts enforce format consistency at PR time — a quality gate that codecrafters lacks.
